data.name: apidog
data.comment: Apidog MCP. Bridges an OpenAPI/Apidog spec into Claude so it can generate clients, docs, and tests from the spec. Point APIDOG_OAS_URL at your spec URL or local path.

data.name: asana
data.comment: Community Asana MCP. Personal access token required.

data.name: atlassian
data.comment: Atlassian Remote MCP — Jira + Confluence. OAuth in-browser.

data.name: aws
data.comment: AWS Labs core MCP (STS, S3, Lambda, CloudWatch).

data.name: brave-search
data.comment: Official Brave Search MCP. Free tier with BRAVE_API_KEY.

data.name: browser-use
data.comment: Community. High-level 'do this in a browser' agent. Form-filling etc.

data.name: canva
data.comment: Canva's official Connect MCP (OAuth).

data.name: clickup
data.comment: Community ClickUp MCP. Workspace 90121466494, team pre-configured.

data.name: cloudflare
data.comment: Cloudflare's official remote MCP. DNS, KV, R2, Workers. OAuth.

data.name: context7
data.comment: Upstash Context7. Up-to-date library/framework docs on demand. Free tier, no auth.

data.name: discord
data.comment: Community Discord MCP. Complements the /chat Discord bot.

data.name: docker
data.comment: Community Docker MCP. Manage containers, images, networks. Requires daemon.

data.name: exa
data.comment: Exa AI search — semantic web search tuned for LLM agents.

data.name: fetch
data.comment: Official. Fetch URLs and convert HTML → markdown. No auth required.

data.name: figma
data.comment: Figma's official Dev Mode MCP. Needs Dev Mode + Figma desktop on port 3845.

data.name: filesystem
data.comment: Official. Read/write/search a sandboxed directory on disk. Set FILESYSTEM_ROOT.

data.name: firecrawl
data.comment: Firecrawl MCP — reliable web scraping + crawling.

data.name: github
data.comment: GitHub's official MCP. Fine-grained PAT with repo + issues + actions scopes.

data.name: gitlab
data.comment: Community GitLab MCP. Set GITLAB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN + GITLAB_API_URL.

data.name: gmail
data.comment: Community Gmail MCP. OAuth device flow on first run.

data.name: google-calendar
data.comment: Google Calendar MCP. OAuth-based.

data.name: google-drive
data.comment: Google Drive (Google's new MCP suite). OAuth via gdrive-credentials.

data.name: google-maps
data.comment: Official Google Maps MCP. Places API key required.

data.name: huggingface
data.comment: Hugging Face official MCP. Model + dataset + spaces search.

data.name: kubernetes
data.comment: Kubernetes MCP. Reads current kubecontext; set KUBECONFIG.

data.name: linear
data.comment: Linear's official remote MCP. OAuth on first use.

data.name: memory
data.comment: Official. Persistent knowledge graph across sessions. Stores in ~/.memory.

data.name: memory-bank
data.comment: Community memory-bank MCP (alioshr). Per-project markdown files under MEMORY_BANK_ROOT — human-readable companion to the knowledge-graph 'memory' entry.

data.name: neon
data.comment: Neon's serverless Postgres MCP.

data.name: notion
data.comment: Notion's official MCP. Internal integration token + page share.

data.name: perplexity
data.comment: Perplexity Ask MCP. Requires PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.

data.name: playwright
data.comment: Microsoft-maintained Playwright MCP. Full browser control.

data.name: postgres
data.comment: Official. Read-only Postgres queries via DATABASE_URL.

data.name: project-tools
data.comment: Placeholder for this project's own HTTP-transport MCP server (if you build one)

data.name: puppeteer
data.comment: Official Puppeteer MCP. Lighter than Playwright for quick automation.

data.name: rain-docs
data.comment: rain internal software-engineering docs (software-engineering.docs.rain.co.za). 1,720 pages across 11+ sections. Tools: rain_search, rain_get_page, rain_list_sections, rain_list_pages_in_section.

data.name: sentry
data.comment: Sentry's official remote MCP. Issue triage. OAuth via browser.

data.name: sequential-thinking
data.comment: Official. Structured step-by-step reasoning. No auth.

data.name: shadcn
data.comment: Shadcn Registry MCP — browse/install shadcn/ui components.

data.name: slack
data.comment: Official Slack MCP. Bot token (xoxb-...) + team id.

data.name: stripe
data.comment: Stripe's official MCP. Read-only by default; STRIPE_MODE=write to mutate.

data.name: supabase
data.comment: Supabase official MCP. DB + auth + storage over your project ref.

data.name: zapier
data.comment: Zapier's official remote MCP. OAuth in-browser on first use. Exposes the user's existing Zaps as callable tools.
